name: Change contact email, preserve the rest of settings
prompt: Update the contact email address to hello@acme.example. Leave everything else in the site settings unchanged.

setup.content:
site:
  name: "My Business"
  tagline: "The best in the business"
  primaryColor: "#4f46e5"
  bgEffect: ["grid", "aura", "hover"]
  logo: ""

contact:
  email: "hello@example.com"
  phone: ""

social:
  twitter: ""
  linkedin: ""
  instagram: ""

navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"
  - label: "About"
    url: "/about"
  - label: "Services"
    url: "/services"
  - label: "Contact"
    url: "/contact"

analytics:
  enabled: true
  website_id: "da39a3ee-5e6b-4b0d-9c8a-c47c5d6e2e3a"

checks.judge: The contact email in settings.yaml was changed to hello@acme.example, and everything else in the file — site name, tagline, all four navigation entries (Home, About, Services, Contact), and social links — is preserved unchanged.

dry_run.text: Updated contact.email to hello@acme.example in content/settings.yaml; left the site name, tagline, navigation, and social links unchanged.

edits.content/settings.yaml:
site:
  name: "My Business"
  tagline: "The best in the business"
  primaryColor: "#4f46e5"
  bgEffect: ["grid", "aura", "hover"]
  logo: ""

contact:
  email: "hello@acme.example"
  phone: ""

social:
  twitter: ""
  linkedin: ""
  instagram: ""

navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"
  - label: "About"
    url: "/about"
  - label: "Services"
    url: "/services"
  - label: "Contact"
    url: "/contact"

analytics:
  enabled: true
  website_id: "da39a3ee-5e6b-4b0d-9c8a-c47c5d6e2e3a"
